auth.label: API Key
auth.description: APIVoid API key sent with the X-API-Key header. Create or view API keys in the APIVoid dashboard: https://dash.apivoid.com/.

actions.name: check_domain_reputation
actions.description: Check the reputation, blacklist status, category flags, and risk score of a domain with APIVoid.

host.description: The domain or host to submit, for example google.com.

excludeEngines.description: Comma-separated APIVoid engine names to exclude from the scan.

spamhausKey.description: Optional Spamhaus DBL DQS key to enable the Spamhaus engine.

includeDomainAge.description: Whether APIVoid should include domain age as a risk factor. This may consume an additional credit.

domainAgeCacheOnly.description: Whether to use only cached domain age data when includeDomainAge is enabled.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for checking domain reputation with APIVoid.

blacklists.description: Blacklist engine results returned by APIVoid.

category.description: Domain category and structural risk flags returned by APIVoid.

domain_age.description: Domain age details returned when requested.

callUsage.description: The amount of credits consumed for the request.

available.description: The amount of credits available after the request.

reset.description: Unix timestamp when credits will next reset.

overageAllowed.description: Whether overage is allowed on the subscription plan.

overageEnabled.description: Whether overage is enabled for the account.

overageValue.description: The amount of overage credits consumed.

overageLimit.description: The maximum overage credits allowed in the billing cycle.

anyOf.description: Quota values parsed from the APIVoid X-Service-Quota response header.

outputSchema.description: APIVoid domain reputation result and quota metadata.

actions.name: check_ip_reputation
actions.description: Check the reputation, blacklist status, and risk score of an IP address with APIVoid.

ip.description: The public IPv4 or IPv6 address to scan with APIVoid.

excludeEngines.description: Comma-separated APIVoid engine names to exclude from the scan.

spamhausKey.description: Optional Spamhaus DBL DQS key to enable the Spamhaus engine.

disableReverseDns.description: Whether to disable reverse DNS lookup to reduce response time.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for checking IP reputation with APIVoid.

ip.description: The IP address submitted for scanning.

blacklists.description: Blacklist engine results returned by APIVoid.

information.description: IP geolocation and network information returned by APIVoid.

anomaly.description: Anomaly and proxy risk flags returned by APIVoid.

callUsage.description: The amount of credits consumed for the request.

available.description: The amount of credits available after the request.

reset.description: Unix timestamp when credits will next reset.

overageAllowed.description: Whether overage is allowed on the subscription plan.

overageEnabled.description: Whether overage is enabled for the account.

overageValue.description: The amount of overage credits consumed.

overageLimit.description: The maximum overage credits allowed in the billing cycle.

anyOf.description: Quota values parsed from the APIVoid X-Service-Quota response header.

outputSchema.description: APIVoid IP reputation result and quota metadata.

actions.name: check_url_reputation
actions.description: Check DNS, blacklist, file, and risk signals for a URL with APIVoid.

url.description: The URL to submit for reputation scanning.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for checking URL reputation with APIVoid.

domain_blacklist.description: Domain blacklist engine results returned by APIVoid.

file_type.description: File type details returned by APIVoid.

callUsage.description: The amount of credits consumed for the request.

available.description: The amount of credits available after the request.

reset.description: Unix timestamp when credits will next reset.

overageAllowed.description: Whether overage is allowed on the subscription plan.

overageEnabled.description: Whether overage is enabled for the account.

overageValue.description: The amount of overage credits consumed.

overageLimit.description: The maximum overage credits allowed in the billing cycle.

anyOf.description: Quota values parsed from the APIVoid X-Service-Quota response header.

outputSchema.description: APIVoid URL reputation result and quota metadata.

actions.name: get_account_info
actions.description: Get APIVoid account credit, overage, and usage information.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for APIVoid account info.

data.description: APIVoid account, credit, overage, and usage statistics.

callUsage.description: The amount of credits consumed for the request.

available.description: The amount of credits available after the request.

reset.description: Unix timestamp when credits will next reset.

overageAllowed.description: Whether overage is allowed on the subscription plan.

overageEnabled.description: Whether overage is enabled for the account.

overageValue.description: The amount of overage credits consumed.

overageLimit.description: The maximum overage credits allowed in the billing cycle.

anyOf.description: Quota values parsed from the APIVoid X-Service-Quota response header.

outputSchema.description: APIVoid account details and quota metadata.

actions.name: verify_email
actions.description: Verify an email address or email domain with APIVoid.

email.description: The email address to submit for APIVoid verification.

domain.description: The email domain to submit when verifying domain-level email signals.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for verifying an email address or email domain with APIVoid. Provide exactly one of email or domain.

email.description: The email address submitted for verification.

canonical_email.description: The normalized email address returned by APIVoid.

valid_format.description: Whether APIVoid found a valid email format.

domain.description: The email domain returned by APIVoid.

disposable.description: Whether the email domain is disposable.

should_block.description: Whether APIVoid recommends blocking the email.

callUsage.description: The amount of credits consumed for the request.

available.description: The amount of credits available after the request.

reset.description: Unix timestamp when credits will next reset.

overageAllowed.description: Whether overage is allowed on the subscription plan.

overageEnabled.description: Whether overage is enabled for the account.

overageValue.description: The amount of overage credits consumed.

overageLimit.description: The maximum overage credits allowed in the billing cycle.

anyOf.description: Quota values parsed from the APIVoid X-Service-Quota response header.

outputSchema.description: APIVoid email verification result and quota metadata.
